testcase.name: Homepage navigation > renders "Minebord" as a link
Theme toggle — read localStorage on mount > adds "dark" class to <html> when localStorage is "dark"
Theme toggle — read localStorage on mount > removes "dark" class from <html> when localStorage is "light"
Theme icon — icon rendered correctly > renders MoonIcon when scheme is dark
Theme icon — icon rendered correctly > renders SunIcon when scheme is light
Theme toggle interaction > toggles from light → dark
Theme toggle interaction > toggles from dark → light
Theme toggle interaction > toggles twice: returns to the original theme
